entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace CreateCicp (SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp colorPrimaries, SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp transferCharacteristics);

params.transferCharacteristics: One of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp" /> values specifying the transfer function.
params.colorPrimaries: One of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp" /> values specifying the color primaries.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace" /> corresponding to the specified CICP parameters, or <see langword="null" /> if the combination is not supported.
fields.summary: Creates a color space from CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) primaries and transfer characteristics.
